narratives.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narratives.evidence_quote: though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.

narratives.evidence_quote: Garcetti’s “Green New Deal” calls for shuttering natural gas plants; it has been opposed by public works unions, and lost the only serious electoral challenge it faced in a 2019 city council race.
narratives.reasoning: The quote criticizes a specific climate policy initiative (the Green New Deal) by highlighting opposition from unions and an electoral loss, which challenges the movement's political viability and support.

narratives.evidence_quote: That is one-fourth (economy) or one-half (premium) the global average per capita use of carbon per year. It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.
narratives.reasoning: By quantifying the flight's carbon emissions as a fraction of an annual average and questioning the necessity of in-person attendance, the text minimizes the significance of the individual action in the context of the broader climate crisis.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities: Criticism of political organizations and figures
